caption: A news broadcast reports on political developments in India, featuring footage of a crowd of men in formal attire, including suits and traditional wear, gathered in what appears to be a government building. The primary focus is on a group of men interacting, with some appearing to be in conversation while others move through the crowd. On-screen graphics include a red and yellow news banner with the text "BREAKING NEWS," which shifts slightly in spelling across frames. A top banner asks, "2024 में JDU के साथ 'खेला' होगा?". Portrait photos of political figures appear on the sides, labeled with names and titles such as "मुख्यमंत्री नीतीश कुमार," "मंत्री संतोष सुमन," and "सुमित कुमार." The lower banner displays "MAHA KHOBAR" and a time stamp of "10:02 PM." As the video progresses, the camera angle shifts slightly, and different political figures' photos appear in the side panels.
